sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH active_stage AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2 m
  JOIN featurestore:merged_anomaly_stage_summary_v2 s
    ON s.processing_run_id = m.active_run_id
   AND s.name = m.name
   AND s.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
   AND s.algorithm_version = m.algorithm_version
  WHERE m.status = 'active'
    AND m.algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND m.fleet_name = :fleet_name
    AND m.pad_name = :pad_name
    AND (
      COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
      OR m.name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
    )
)
SELECT
  name AS well_name,
  stage_num_td AS stage_num,
  stage_start_ts,
  stage_end_ts,
  source_rows,
  total_anomaly_lines,
  pressure_surge_lines,
  pump_rate_drop_lines,
  mid_stage_shutdown_lines,
  sweep_lines
FROM active_stage
ORDER BY name, stage_num_td
) q
